goals.title: Build secure home network
goals.description: Set up fiber, structured cabling, AP, Pi-hole DNS filtering, and WireGuard VPN on Raspberry Pi for whole-home coverage and secure remote access

milestones.title: Pi-hole installed and handling DNS for all zones
WireGuard VPN running on Raspberry Pi
Atlas dashboard accessible remotely via WireGuard

goals.next_action: Wait for fiber installation — use the waiting time to plan cabling routes and buy materials
goals.notes: Pi-hole and WireGuard will run on same Raspberry Pi. Pi-hole handles DNS filtering for whole home. WireGuard replaces Tailscale for remote access — self-hosted, no external dependency.

goals.title: Atlas on GitHub with CI
goals.description: Push Atlas to a private GitHub repo and set up GitHub Actions for automated dependency audits and security checks

milestones.title: GitHub Actions: weekly npm audit on both packages
GitHub Actions: lint check on PR

goals.next_action: Create the GitHub repo and .gitignore first — make sure health/budget data is excluded
goals.notes: IMPORTANT: data/health/ and data/budget/ must be in .gitignore — these are private. Also exclude .env, config/integrations.yaml, and data/prices/ (contains scraped price history).
